languages.text: Среди всех легионов космодесанта именно Несущие Слово первыми поклялись в верности Темным Богам Хаоса. Харизматичные, пылкие и красноречивые, они идеально подходят для распространения ереси среди слуг Императора.

The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.
languages.original_text: Среди всех легионов космодесанта именно Несущие Слово первыми поклялись в верности Темным Богам Хаоса. Харизматичные, пылкие и красноречивые, они идеально подходят для распространения ереси среди слуг Императора.

traits.locale_text: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear loyalty to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are a perfect fit for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

languages.text: Die Word Bearer waren die erste Legion der Space Marines, die den Dunklen Göttern des Chaos Treue gelobten. Charismatisch, leidenschaftlich und eloquent sind sie das perfekte Werkzeug, um unter den Dienern des Imperators Ketzerei zu verbreiten.
languages.original_text: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

traits.locale_text: Die Word Bearer waren die erste Legion der Space Marines, die den Dunklen Göttern des Chaos Treue gelobten. Charismatisch, leidenschaftlich und eloquent sind sie das perfekte Werkzeug, um unter den Dienern des Imperators Ketzerei zu verbreiten.

languages.text: Los Portadores de la Palabra fueron los primeros entre las legiones de los Marines Espaciales en jurar lealtad a los Dioses Oscuros del Caos. Carismáticos, apasionados y elocuentes, son perfectos para extender la herejía entre los sirvientes del Emperador.
languages.original_text: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

traits.locale_text: Los Portadores de la Palabra fueron los primeros entre las legiones de los Marines Espaciales en jurar lealtad a los Dioses Oscuros del Caos. Carismáticos, apasionados y elocuentes, son perfectos para extender la herejía entre los sirvientes del Emperador.

languages.text: 怀言者是最先宣誓效忠混沌黑暗诸神的星际战士军团。他们富有魅力、狂热且能言善辩，是在帝皇仆从中传播异端思想的完美人选。
languages.original_text: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

traits.locale_text: 怀言者是最先宣誓效忠混沌黑暗诸神的星际战士军团。他们富有魅力、狂热且能言善辩，是在帝皇仆从中传播异端思想的完美人选。

languages.text: Vahyedenler, Kaos'un Kara Tanrılarına bağlılık yemini eden ilk Uzay Piyadesi lejyonudur. Karizmatik, tutkulu ve ağzı iyi laf yapan bu topluluk; İmparator'un hizmetkârları arasında kâfirliği yaymak için biçilmiş kaftandır.
languages.original_text: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

traits.locale_text: Vahyedenler, Kaos'un Kara Tanrılarına bağlılık yemini eden ilk Uzay Piyadesi lejyonudur. Karizmatik, tutkulu ve ağzı iyi laf yapan bu topluluk; İmparator'un hizmetkârları arasında kâfirliği yaymak için biçilmiş kaftandır.

languages.text: De toutes les légions de Space Marine, les Word Bearers furent les premiers à prêter allégeance aux Dieux Sombres du Chaos. Charismatiques, passionnés et éloquents, ce sont les prêcheurs idéaux pour répandre l'hérésie parmi les serviteurs de l'Empereur.
languages.original_text: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

traits.locale_text: De toutes les légions de Space Marine, les Word Bearers furent les premiers à prêter allégeance aux Dieux Sombres du Chaos. Charismatiques, passionnés et éloquents, ce sont les prêcheurs idéaux pour répandre l'hérésie parmi les serviteurs de l'Empereur.

languages.text: ワード・ベアラーは、いかなるスペースマリーン軍団よりも先に混沌の暗黒神への忠誠を誓った最初の存在である。カリスマ的で、熱烈で、雄弁な彼らは、皇帝の僕たちの間に異端を広める任務にうってつけである。
languages.original_text: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.

traits.locale_text: ワード・ベアラーは、いかなるスペースマリーン軍団よりも先に混沌の暗黒神への忠誠を誓った最初の存在である。カリスマ的で、熱烈で、雄弁な彼らは、皇帝の僕たちの間に異端を広める任務にうってつけである。
